userStories.title: Automated coverage overlap report
userStories.description: Write a Bun script at scripts/check-test-overlap.ts that cross-references integration tests against unit tests to identify redundant coverage. The script should: (1) parse all test files under test/unit/ and test/integration/ using regex to extract describe/test block names and imported source modules; (2) for each integration test, check whether a unit test exists that imports the same source module and covers the same function/describe path; (3) output a markdown report at docs/test-overlap-report.md listing (a) integration tests fully covered by unit tests - safe to delete, (b) integration tests with partial overlap - review, (c) unique integration tests - keep. Run via: bun run scripts/check-test-overlap.ts. The script must not require packages beyond what is already in package.json.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/check-test-overlap.ts exists and runs without errors via bun run scripts/check-test-overlap.ts
Script parses all files under test/unit/ and test/integration/ without crashing
Output is written to docs/test-overlap-report.md with sections: REDUNDANT, PARTIAL, UNIQUE
REDUNDANT section lists at least one integration test that is fully covered by a unit test
Script completes in under 10 seconds on the full test suite

userStories.title: Dead test detection
userStories.description: Create scripts/check-dead-tests.ts to detect test files that import source modules that no longer exist in src/. The script should: (1) scan all test files for import statements pointing into src/; (2) verify each imported path exists on disk; (3) flag any test file where at least one src/ import is missing; (4) write a report to docs/dead-tests-report.md listing flagged files with their missing imports and a recommendation (delete/review). Also flag test files whose describe/test names reference removed features such as worktree/dispatcher, tdd-orchestrator-prompts, or old verification paths pre-v0.22.1.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/check-dead-tests.ts exists and runs via bun run scripts/check-dead-tests.ts
Script scans all files under test/ for broken src/ imports
Report written to docs/dead-tests-report.md listing flagged files with missing imports
Each entry shows: file path, missing import paths, recommendation
Script completes in under 10 seconds

userStories.title: Copy-paste test consolidation
userStories.description: Identify test files with 3 or more similar describe blocks differing by only 1-2 parameters and convert them to test.each() table-driven style. Target files: test/unit/context.test.ts (1734 lines), test/unit/execution/parallel-executor-rectification.test.ts, test/unit/metrics/tracker-escalation.test.ts. For each file: (1) identify repeated describe/test blocks with identical structure; (2) convert to test.each() with a table of varying parameters; (3) verify all tests still pass after conversion. Aim for 20% or more line reduction in each converted file. Do not change test semantics, only consolidate identical structure.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 test files converted to test.each() table-driven style
Each converted file shows 20% or more line count reduction
All converted tests still pass: bun test on the converted file exits 0
No test descriptions or covered code paths are removed, only structure consolidated
Converted files use bun:test compatible test.each() syntax

userStories.title: Execute confirmed redundant test cleanup
userStories.description: Using the reports from TH-001 and TH-002, delete confirmed redundant and dead test files and verify the full suite still passes. Steps: (1) delete integration test files marked REDUNDANT in docs/test-overlap-report.md; (2) delete test files marked DEAD in docs/dead-tests-report.md; (3) run full suite: NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 bun test test/ --timeout=60000; (4) fix any cascading failures; (5) update any barrel imports that referenced deleted files. Target: 15% or more reduction in total test count from the current approximately 3522 passing tests.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 5 test files deleted (redundant and dead combined)
Full suite passes after deletion: bun test test/ --timeout=60000 exits 0
Total passing test count reduced by 15% or more vs baseline
No previously-passing test now fails
docs/test-overlap-report.md and docs/dead-tests-report.md updated to mark deleted files as REMOVED

userStories.title: Test file size enforcement
userStories.description: Add a script that warns on test files exceeding 500 lines and fails on test files exceeding 800 lines. Implementation: (1) create scripts/check-test-sizes.ts scanning test/ for oversized files; (2) soft limit 500 lines: print a warning with file and line count; (3) hard limit 800 lines: exit with code 1 unless NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1; (4) add package.json script entry check:test-sizes; (5) create docs/testing-conventions.md documenting the 500/800 line limits and test.each() recommendation.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/check-test-sizes.ts exists and runs via bun run check:test-sizes
Script lists all test files over 500 lines with their line counts
Script exits with code 1 if any test file exceeds 800 lines
NAX_SKIP_PRECHECK=1 suppresses the hard-limit exit
docs/testing-conventions.md documents the 500/800 line limits and test.each() recommendation
